title: Yet Another Craftable Bedrock Mod
description: A simple mod that allows you to craft bedrock.
body:
![Logo](http://i.imgur.com/SfWf5Z3.png) This is a simple mod that allows you to craft bedrock using the following recipes. # Crafting Recipes ## v1.X: ![v1.X Crafting Recipe](http://i.imgur.com/I4SL1QH.png) ## v2.X: ![v2.X Crafting Recipe](http://i.imgur.com/kRiNelg.png) ## v3.X: ![v3.X Crafting Recipe](http://i.imgur.com/noyjBuK.png) # Installation
1.7.10/1.8 - Install [Forge](http://files.minecraftforge.net) for the Minecraft version you are playing. - Place the "YACBM_vX.X" into the "mods" folder. - Startup Minecraft and play!
# FAQ
FAQ **Q:** Can I suggest an easier/harder recipe for this mod? **A:** Of course! Please raise an issue [here](https://github.com/haruyuki/YACBM/issues) with how you want it to be like (I will not accept very simple ones, such as a single dirt block) and I'll see what I can do.
**Q:** Does vX.X include the recipes from the previous versions? **A:** No it doesn't, if you want to have both recipes in your game you would have to download both mods separately, but due to the way I coded the mod, you cannot install two recipes at the same time.
# Alternative Links **CurseForge:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yacbm-yet-another-craftable-bedrock-mod **Minecraft Forum:** http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/minecraft-mods/2335910
